title: zenkeria obtusiflora
intro: Zenkeria obtusiflora, also known as the Chinese angelica or wild angelica, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to East Asia, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues. Zenkeria obtusiflora is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in modern herbal remedies.
